ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "sort_date" TEXT /* Sort date for the match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "league" TEXT /* League or division the match belongs to */,
  "round" TEXT /* Round of the match */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Home team participating in the match */,
  "home_goals" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Away team participating in the match */,
  "away_goals" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the away team */,
  "crowd" INTEGER /* Crowd attendance during the match */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stadium where the match took place */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the referee who officiated the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Description of the weather conditions during the match */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., completed, postponed, cancelled) */,
  "home_team_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards issued to the home team */,
  "home_team_red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards issued to the home team */,
  "away_team_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards issued to the away team */,
  "away_team_red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards issued to the away team */,
  "home_team_shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Number of shots on goal by the home team */,
  "away_team_shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Number of shots on goal by the away team */,
  "home_team_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the home team */,
  "away_team_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the away team */,
  "home_team_corner_kicks" INTEGER /* Number of corner kicks by the home team */,
  "away_team_corner_kicks" INTEGER /* Number of corner kicks by the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_league FOREIGN KEY ("league") REFERENCES leagues ("league_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_round FOREIGN KEY ("round") REFERENCES rounds ("round_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team FOREIGN KEY ("home_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team FOREIGN KEY ("away_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the soccer team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division or league the team belongs to */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home stadium of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Colors of the team's uniform */,
  "team_captain" TEXT /* Name of the team captain */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "league_champion" TEXT /* Name of the current or most recent champion of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "round_name" TEXT /* Name of the round */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league it belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the round */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crowd_statistics" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match associated with the attendance record */,
  "crowd_size" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the match */,
  "ticket_sales" INTEGER /* Number of tickets sold for the match */,
  "average_ticket_price" REAL /* Average price of tickets sold for the match */,
  "attendance_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of stadium capacity filled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crowd_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match result */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match associated with the result */,
  "final_score" TEXT /* Final score of the match (e.g., 2:1) */,
  "home_team_possession" REAL /* Percentage of possession for the home team */,
  "away_team_possession" REAL /* Percentage of possession for the away team */,
  "home_team_offside" INTEGER /* Number of offside calls for the home team */,
  "away_team_offside" INTEGER /* Number of offside calls for the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the stadium is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "built_year" INTEGER /* Year the stadium was built */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the referee is from */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience as a referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)
